scripts.wdio:report: wdio run wdio.conf.ts && npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.wdio:task4:report: wdio run wdio.conf.ts --spec=./tests/task4.spec.ts && npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.report:open: npx allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && npx allure open allure-report
